response.step_by_step_log:
1. Scene Mapping & Visual OCR: Analyzed the video for on-screen text. Detected 'ALL FOR ONE' as the song title and 'Hololive English' as the artist/performer.
2. Song Metadata Resolution: Identified the song as 'All for One' by 'Hololive English'. The song is in English.
3. Web Search: Used the query '"All for One" Hololive English lyrics' to retrieve the full lyrics from Lyrical Nonsense.
4. JSON Generation: Formatted the extracted information into the required JSON structure, including the full lyrics for both original language and English translation (which are identical in this case).
response.global_summary: This is a promotional video snippet for the Hololive English 3rd Concert, titled 'ALL FOR ONE'. The video features the concert's theme song, 'All for One', performed by the members of Hololive English.

scenes.description: The video displays a promotional concert stage featuring Hololive English members performing the song 'All for One'. On-screen text includes 'ALL FOR ONE' and the concert hashtag.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ooh~
Just look around and see—it’s so incredible!
So many smiles in a sea of light
Take one step with me and you’ll be dazzled,
There’s magic in the air tonight
The hours ZOOM ZOOM ZOOM
My heart goes BOOM BOOM BOOM
The world is brighter because you believe in me
Let’s shout it LOUD LOUD LOUD
Our time is RIGHT NOW
We’re on the edge of destiny
For a moment, I can dream with you
Every miracle we hoped for might come true
We come together, reaching out from far and wide,
And suddenly, you’re here by my side!
(Let’s sing! ALL FOR ONE!)
The thrill of happiness is all around us!
Jump in, ‘cause it’s all for one!
Come on, let’s go!
We’re all for one!
Yeah, yeah, yeah!
We’re all for one!
(Let’s sing! ALL FOR ONE!)
And suddenly, our hearts beat as one!
Every voice ringing loud and clear, so glad to be here
Together, we’re all for one!
